Backup.title: Backup
Backup.description: Local or cloud data backup for user's benefits and queries

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the backup was created

trigger.description: How the backup was triggered (e.g. manual, auto)

data.description: Stringified JSON of the backed up data

code.description: Activation key used to identify the user

ActivationKey.title: Activation Key
ActivationKey.description: License key for activating premium features

used.description: Whether the key has been used

activatedAt.description: Timestamp when the key was activated

deviceId.description: Device ID associated with the activation

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the key was generated

StatsState.title: Stats State
StatsState.description: Global statistics for visitors and subscribers

/backups/{backupId}.description: Client-side manual/auto backups of scholar's data

/cloud_backups/{backupId}.description: Cloud-synced backups managed through the server

/activation_keys/{key}.description: Pre-seeded or admin-generated premium licensing keys

/app_state/{documentId}.description: Global states including admin settings and system-wide counters
